title: ocimum tuberosum
intro: Ocimum tuberosum, also known as Mexican basil or Indian borage, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, characterized by its edible tubers and fragrant leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocimum tuberosum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and culinary properties.
